emails.subject: RE: El Paso Data Request
emails.body: RE: El Paso Data Request When/how do we get Mary Kay's name off this Letter looks fine to me.

emails.subject: RE: El Paso Data Request
emails.body: I'm working with Jan Butler to accomplish this. We'll need to make a FERC filing. My experience is that it sometimes takes a while before the other parties to a proceeding change their service lists. But this is all that we can do.

emails.subject: RE: El Paso Data Request
emails.body: Should we make it clear she had nothing to do with this response?
